title: adenostemma viscosum var. parviflorum
intro: Adenostemma viscosum var. parviflorum, also known as the 'false dragonhead', is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Adenostemma viscosum var. parviflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
